name: NF - He-Man and the Masters of the Universe (US)
plot: Mighty teen Adam and his heroic squad of misfits discover the legendary power of Grayskull — and their destiny to defend Eternia from sinister Skeletor.
genre: Sci-Fi & Fantasy, Animation, Family, Action & Adventure

name: NF - Headspace Guide to Meditation (US)
plot: The series shows how meditation can help in your daily life. From tackling stress to embracing gratitude, each episode first teaches the basics and techniques of the practice, and then concludes with a guided meditation. Push play, close your eyes, and explore the many benefits of meditation.

name: NF - Headspace Guide to Sleep (US)
plot: Learn how to sleep better with Headspace. Each episode unpacks misconceptions, offers friendly tips and concludes with a guided wind-down

name: NF - Hello Ninja (CA)
plot: BFFs Wesley and Georgie and their silly cat sidekick Pretzel transform into ninjas and enter a magic world, where they solve problems and save the day.

name: NF - Henry Danger (2014) (US)
plot: When 13-year-old Henry Hart lands a job as Danger, the sidekick-in-training to superhero Captain Man, he must learn to navigate a double life balancing the challenges of 8th grade with the crazy adventures of a real-life crime fighter!
cast: Jace Norman, Cooper Barnes, Riele Downs, Sean Ryan Fox, Ella Anderson, Michael D. Cohen

name: NF - High Score (US)
plot: This docuseries traces the history of classic video games, featuring insights from the innovators who brought these worlds and characters to life.

name: NF - Hilda (GB)
plot: Fearless, free-spirited Hilda finds new friends, adventure and magical creatures when she leaves her enchanted forest home and journeys to the city.

name: NF - I Heart Arlo (US)
plot: Arlo and his newfound crew set up shop in an abandoned seaside neighborhood and help bring it back to life.

name: NF - Inspector Gadget (CA)
plot: Inspector Gadget is a clumsy, dim-witted human cyborg detective with various bionic gadgets built into his body. Gadget stumbles around working the cases while his niece and dog do most of the investigating. Gadget's arch-nemesis is Dr. Claw, the leader of an evil organisation, known as "M.A.D."
director: Bruno Bianchi, Jean Chalopin, Andy Heyward

name: NF - Johnny Test (CA)
plot: Young Johnny is gung-ho and full of courage. Johnny's brainiac twin sisters, Susan and Mary, use Johnny as their guinea pig for their outrageous scientific experiments. If they can dream it up, Johnny will do it; as long as his genetically engineered super dog, Dukey, can come along.

name: NF - Jurassic World: Camp Cretaceous (US)
plot: Six teens attending an adventure camp on the opposite side of Isla Nublar must band together to survive when dinosaurs wreak havoc on the island.

name: NF - Karma's World Music Videos (US)
plot: Step into Karma's musical world as she rocks the mic -- and her curls -- for this fun and funky playlist packed with rhymes and the power of positivity!

name: NF - Karma’s World (US)
plot: Talented singer and high school student Karma juggles rap dreams and rhyme schemes, using her talent, ambition and big heart to solve all kinds of problems.

name: NF - Kid Cosmic (US)
plot: A boy's superhero dreams come true when he finds five powerful cosmic stones. But saving the day is harder than he imagined — and he can't do it alone.

name: NF - Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts (US)
plot: A sheltered girl gets a crash course in survival when a mutant attack sends her to the surface, far from the safety of her underground home.

name: NF - Larva Island (KR)
plot: Stranded on a tropical island, two silly larva buddies find slapstick fun in everything from discovering food to meeting new animal friends.

name: NF - LEGO City Adventures (US)
plot: Welcome to LEGO City, a modern metropolis filled with the fiercest firefighters, the cream of the crop cops, and so many Blockheads. Every citizen will assemble together for the most awesomely awesome adventures.

name: NF - Making Fun (US)
plot: Grumpy expert maker Jimmy DiResta fields kids' ideas for delightfully pointless inventions. Then — if he's in the mood — he and his pals build 'em.

name: NF - Marcus Level (DE)
genre: Animation, Family, Kids, Comedy, Sci-Fi & Fantasy

name: NF - Maya and the Three (2021) (MX)
plot: A spirited princess with the heart of a warrior embarks on a mission to fulfill an ancient prophecy and save humanity from the wrath of vengeful gods.
cast: Zoe Saldaña, Jorge R. Gutierrez, Sandra Equihua, Dee Bradley Baker, Diego Luna, Gael García Bernal, Allen Maldonado, Stephanie Beatriz
genre: Animation / Family / Action & Adventure / Comedy / Kids

name: NF - Mighty Express
plot: Catch a ride with the Mighty Express — a team of trains and their kid friends who overcome trouble on the tracks with quick thinking and teamwork!

name: NF - Mighty Little Bheem: Kite Festival
plot: With winter behind them, Bheem and his townspeople usher in a sunny new season in all their favorite ways during the Makar Sankranti festival.

name: NF - Monster Math Squad
plot: Monster Math Squad stars MAX, LILY and GOO. The Squad love nothing better than to put their monster minds together and use their math skills to overcome any obstacle they face.

name: NF - Nate Is Late
plot: Every morning, Nate and Malika leave home 30 minutes early to go to school, and yet every morning they arrive late! That’s because every morning, something AMAZING happens on the way. But even though their stories are always true, Principal Prudence never believes them…

name: NF - Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu (DK)
plot: When the fate of their world, Ninjago, is challenged by great threats, it's up to the ninja: Kai, Jay, Cole, Zane, Lloyd and Nya to save the world.
genre: Action & Adventure, Animation, Comedy, Family, Sci-Fi & Fantasy, Kids

name: NF - Octonauts: Above & Beyond
plot: The Octonauts expand their exploration beyond the sea -- and onto land! With new rides and new friends, they'll protect any habitats and animals at risk.

name: NF - PAW Patrol (US)
plot: A group of six rescue dogs is led by a tech-savvy boy named Ryder. The heroic pups, who believe "no job is too big, no pup is too small," work together to protect the community. Among the members of the group are firedog Marshall, police pup Chase, and fearless Skye. All of the animals have special skills, gadgets and vehicles that help them on their rescue missions. Whether rescuing a kitten or saving a train from a rockslide, the PAW Patrol is always up for the challenge while also making sure there's time for a game or a laugh.

name: NF - Pinky Malinky
plot: Pinky Malinky sees the bright side of everything, including being born a hot dog. With his BFFs in tow, this little wiener takes a bite out of life.

name: NF - PJ Masks (GB)
plot: Connor, Greg and Amaya are normal kids by day, but at night they activate their bracelets, which link into their pajamas and give them fantastic super powers, turning them into their alternate identities: The PJ Masks. The team consists of Catboy (Connor), Gekko (Greg) and Owelette (Amaya). Together, they go on adventures, solve mysteries, and learn valuable lessons.

name: NF - Pup Academy (US)
plot: Welcome to a secret world where pups learn to be a human's best friend. Follow three unlikely puppies - and their human friends - as they work together to discover the power of friendship and create everlasting bonds between dogs and humans.

name: NF - Rhyme Time Town (US)
plot: Fun-loving friends Daisy and Cole use music and imagination to solve problems in a town filled with nursery rhyme characters.

name: NF - Ridley Jones (US)
plot: Curious kid Ridley and her friends protect the Museum of Natural History’s treasures and keep its magical secret safe: Everything comes alive at night!

name: NF - School of Roars (GB)
plot: Class is in session for mini-monsters Wufflebump, Meepa, Icklewoo, Wingston and Yummble, who learn quirky lessons from their teacher Miss Grizzlesniff.

name: NF - Sharkdog (SG)
plot: 10 year old Max and his best friend Sharkdog - half shark, half dog, all appetite. Blissfully unaware of his own strength, stealth and general sharkiness, Sharkdog often leaves a trail of chaos in his wake.

name: NF - So Not Worth It (KR)
plot: New friends, new loves and new experiences mix together inside a colorful college dormitory in Korea that's home to students from around the world.

name: NF - Spirit Riding Free: Pony Tales (US)
plot: Find the fun and adventure of "Spirit Riding Free" in this mix of music videos and short episodes featuring Lucky and all of her friends!

name: NF - StarBeam (US)
plot: Zoey is excited to tackle second grade, but when danger beckons, she sneaks away and with her signature call out and transforms into StarBeam, the speediest, most powerful and most enthusiastic superhero to ever sip from a juicebox.

name: NF - Sugar Rush (US)
plot: A relentlessly fast-paced baking competition that challenges brilliant bakers to create sweet treats that look and taste amazing – all against the clock. Who will race to the finish and win $10,000?

name: NF - Talking Tom and Friends (US)
plot: Armed with technological gear, great ideas and an unfailing sense of humour, Talking Tom and his friends are on a mission to reach stardom at all costs.
director: Boris Dolenc, Samo Login, Tom Martin

name: NF - Team Zenko Go (US)
plot: Every good deed is one for this team of kids. Niah, Ari, Ellie and Jax go undercover to help others and secretly solve the city's problems!

name: NF - The Boss Baby: Back in Business (US)
plot: With a little help from his brother and accomplice, Tim, Boss Baby tries to balance family life with his job at Baby Corp headquarters.

name: NF - The Boss Baby: Back in the Crib (US)
plot: Framed for a corporate crime, an adult Ted Templeton turns back into the Boss Baby to live undercover with his brother, Tim, posing as one of his kids.

name: NF - The Creature Cases (2022) (GB)
plot: Special agents Sam and Kit hop the globe with their sleuthing skills, science facts and cool gadgets to solve the animal kingdom's many mysteries.
cast: Nneka Okoye, Shash Hira

name: NF - The Healing Powers of Dude
plot: Noah, an 11-year-old boy with social anxiety disorder, has to start middle school, he turns to a mutt named Dude, a sarcastic emotional support dog who might need Noah as much as Noah needs him.

name: NF - The Holiday Movies That Made Us (US)
plot: Unwrap the real stories behind these iconic Christmas blockbusters, thanks to insider interviews and behind-the-scenes peeks.

name: NF - The Hollow (CA)
plot: Three teens join forces to find a way home after waking up in a strange realm filled with magic portals, perplexing puzzles and vicious beasts.
director: Vito Viscomi, Josh Mepham, Kathy A. Rocchio, Greg Sullivan

name: NF - The Midnight Gospel (US)
plot: Traversing trippy worlds inside his universe simulator, Clancy the space caster explores existential questions about life, death and everything in between.
genre: Comedy, Animation, Sci-Fi & Fantasy, Kids, Mystery

name: NF - The Sound of Your Heart (KR)
plot: Comedy following Cho Seok's ridiculous but hilarious adventures with his girlfriend-turned-wife Ae Bong, their dogs, older brother Jo Joon, and parents. Based on the popular webtoon series of the same name.

name: NF - Trash Truck (US)
plot: Six-year old Hank and his best pal, a giant trash truck, explore the world around them on fantastical adventures with their animal friends.

name: NF - Trash Truck (US)
plot: Six-year old Hank and his best pal, a giant trash truck, explore the world around them on fantastical adventures with their animal friends.

name: NF - Trese (PH)
plot: In Manila, where dark supernatural forces pervade the criminal underworld, it’s up to Alexandra Trese to keep the peace — but there’s a storm brewing.

name: NF - Waffles + Mochi (US)
plot: Curious puppet pals Waffles and Mochi travel the world exploring the wonders of food and culture while learning how to cook with fresh ingredients.

name: NF - Word Party (US)
plot: Meet Bailey, Franny, Kip and Lulu. They're adorable baby animals, and they want you to join the party and help them learn!

name: NF - Word Party (US)
plot: Meet Bailey, Franny, Kip and Lulu. They're adorable baby animals, and they want you to join the party and help them learn!

name: NF - Word Party Songs
plot: Sing along and dance with Bailey, Franny, Kip, Lulu and Tilly in this collection of music videos that will get you in the mood to move and groove!
